zatca.title: Saudi Electronic Invoicing
zatca.branch_name: Branch Name or VAT Group Number
zatca.phase2_warning: Initiating connection for Phase 2 requires a valid OTP from ZATCA Fatoora portal. Ensure all company details match your ZATCA registration.
zatca.tax_number_invalid: Invalid Tax Number, must be 15 digits
zatca.platform_simulation_desc: Configuration to test and send electronic invoices for simulation on the Fatoora simulation platform.
zatca.platform_production_desc: Configuration for actual issuance and submission of electronic invoices to the authority.
zatca.how_to_get_otp: How to get OTP activation codes
zatca.visual_guide_placeholder: Visual guide for this step (as shown in design)
zatca.otp_difference_title: What is the difference between the first and second code?
zatca.otp_difference_desc: The first code is used to connect the establishment for the first time, while the second code is used to initialize units and devices and ensure continuity of the technical connection.
zatca.help_step1_desc: Login to Fatoora platform via the link below or via the authority's website by clicking on the electronic invoice icon and then clicking on Fatoora platform.
zatca.help_step2_desc: To navigate to the Fatoora simulation platform, click on 'Fatoora Simulation Platform' in the top right corner.
zatca.help_step3_desc: Before continuing on the Fatoora simulation platform, please read the terms and conditions, and after checking the acknowledgment box, you can click 'Next' to continue.
zatca.help_step5_desc: The taxpayer selects 'Issue one-time password' then writes 2 in the number of codes, then clicks 'Create activation code'.
zatca.help_step6_desc: The Fatoora platform issues a one-time password - valid for one hour and strictly for single use - copy the two codes into the Alostaz program.
